text:
is a compilation of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Film Books for Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It was written by Newtype Editorial Department and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 30 March 2000. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048531417 

Overview

The book is a compilation of previous books and cover from the Episode:12 to Episode:26.
